SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.gateway.config

Class RateLimitConfig

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.gateway.config.RateLimitConfig
@Configuration @ConditionalOnProperty(name="orasaka.infrastructure.rate-limit.enabled", havingValue="true") public class RateLimitConfig extends Object
Conditional configuration class for the dynamic rate limiting engine.

Only instantiates client connection pools to Redis when the master toggle orasaka.infrastructure.rate-limit.enabled is set to true.

    Description

    Constructs the rate limiting configuration class with injected environment properties.

  • Constructor Details

    • RateLimitConfig

      public RateLimitConfig(RateLimitProperties properties)
      Constructs the rate limiting configuration class with injected environment properties.
      Parameters:
      properties - The configuration properties mapping orasaka.infrastructure.rate-limit.

  • Method Details

    • redisClient

      @Bean(destroyMethod="shutdown") public io.lettuce.core.RedisClient redisClient()
      Instantiates the standalone Lettuce RedisClient bean.
      Returns:
      The configured and ready RedisClient instance.
      See Also:
      • RedisClient

    • redisConnection

      @Bean(destroyMethod="close") public io.lettuce.core.api.StatefulRedisConnection<String,byte[]> redisConnection(io.lettuce.core.RedisClient redisClient)
      Opens a stateful connection to the Redis server using a UTF-8 String codec for keys and a raw byte array codec for values.
      Parameters:
      redisClient - The active Lettuce Redis client.
      Returns:
      A thread-safe, stateful connection bean to Redis.
      See Also:
      • StatefulRedisConnection

    • proxyManager

      @Bean public io.github.bucket4j.distributed.proxy.ProxyManager<String> proxyManager(io.lettuce.core.api.StatefulRedisConnection<String,byte[]> connection)
      Builds the Bucket4j Lettuce-based ProxyManager to allow atomic remote bucket evaluation.
      Parameters:
      connection - The stateful connection to Redis.
      Returns:
      The Lettuce-backed proxy manager bean.
      See Also:
      • ProxyManager

    • rateLimitFilter

      @Bean public RateLimitFilter rateLimitFilter(io.github.bucket4j.distributed.proxy.ProxyManager<String> proxyManager, com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaRateLimitTierRepository tierRepository)
      Instantiates the custom RateLimitFilter bean using the Lettuce proxy manager and a JDBC template to retrieve database tiers.
      Parameters:
      proxyManager - The remote bucket manager.
      tierRepository - The repository to retrieve database rate limit tiers.
      Returns:
      The rate limiting servlet filter instance.
      See Also:
      • RateLimitFilter

    • rateLimitFilterRegistration

      @Bean public org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.FilterRegistrationBean<RateLimitFilter> rateLimitFilterRegistration(RateLimitFilter filter)
      Configures a FilterRegistrationBean to disable automatic container registration of the filter.

      This prevents the filter from intercepting requests prior to standard Spring Security, allowing user authentication context to be resolved first.

      Parameters:
      filter - The custom rate limit filter bean.
      Returns:
      A disabled filter registration bean.
      See Also:
      • SecurityConfig
